name: ollamapilot
description: Your offline AI co-pilot powered by Ollama with MCP support — 100% local, no telemetry, no internet required

scripts.package: npm run compile && npx vsce package
scripts.test:harness: npm run compile && mocha --require dist/test/vscode-mock.js --timeout 30000 dist/test/unit/agentHarness.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: npm run compile && nyc mocha dist/test/unit/**/*.test.js

commands.title: Ollama: Ingest Markdown Files into Memory
Ollama: Scan Project Docs into Memory
Ollama: Export Agent Log for Review

ollamaAgent.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Full base URL for the Ollama server, e.g. `http://localhost:11434`. When set, overrides `host` + `port`.

ollamaAgent.host.description: Ollama server hostname (used only when baseUrl is empty).

ollamaAgent.port.description: Ollama server port (used only when baseUrl is empty).

ollamaAgent.model.description: Default model to use when the extension starts. Overridable per session via the model selector in the sidebar.

ollamaAgent.temperature.markdownDescription: Sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, 1 = balanced, 2 = creative). Only sent to Ollama when it differs from the default.

ollamaAgent.systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt override. Leave empty to use the built-in coding assistant prompt.

ollamaAgent.autoIncludeFile.description: Auto-attach the full active file content to every message sent.

ollamaAgent.autoIncludeSelection.description: Auto-attach selected code from the active editor when a selection exists.

ollamaAgent.maxContextFiles.description: Maximum number of workspace files to include when the agent auto-loads context. Higher values increase token usage.

ollamaAgent.injectGitDiff.markdownDescription: When enabled, injects a concise `git diff` of your uncommitted changes into every message. Helps the agent understand what you're currently working on. Only works in git repositories.

ollamaAgent.autoRunTests.description: When enabled, automatically run the corresponding test file after a successful edit. Results are shown in the chat. Only runs if a matching test file is found.

ollamaAgent.mcpServers.markdownDescription: MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers to connect to. Each server provides additional tools for the agent. Example: `[{"name": "filesystem", "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "/path/to/workspace"]}]`

ollamaAgent.memory.enabled.description: Enable multi-tiered memory system for persistent project knowledge.

ollamaAgent.memory.qdrantUrl.markdownDescription: Qdrant server URL for semantic search (e.g., `http://localhost:6333`). Leave empty to automatically use Ollama host with port 6333.

ollamaAgent.memory.qdrantHost.description: Qdrant hostname. Leave empty to use Ollama host.

ollamaAgent.memory.embeddingModel.description: Ollama embedding model for semantic search (e.g., nomic-embed-text, mxbai-embed-large).

ollamaAgent.memory.embeddingUrl.description: Ollama URL for embeddings. Leave empty to use main Ollama URL.

ollamaAgent.memory.autoLoadTiers.description: Memory tiers to auto-load on session start (0=critical, 1=essential, 2=operational).

ollamaAgent.memory.demotionThresholdDays.description: Days before demoting stale memories to lower tier.

ollamaAgent.memory.promotionAccessCount.description: Number of accesses before promoting memory to higher tier.

ollamaAgent.memory.archiveThresholdDays.description: Days before archiving old memories to Tier 5.

ollamaAgent.memory.maxContextTokens.description: Maximum tokens for memory context in prompts.

ollamaAgent.memory.semanticSearchLimit.description: Default number of results for semantic search queries.

ollamaAgent.memory.fallbackToLocal.description: Fall back to local storage if Qdrant is unavailable.

ollamaAgent.memory.autoSave.markdownDescription: Automatically save important information to memory as the AI discovers it. Saves are filtered through garbage patterns and semantic dedup to prevent noise.

ollamaAgent.autoCompactContext.markdownDescription: Automatically compact conversation history when context reaches 99% of model's limit. You'll be alerted at 70% usage and reminded until 99%, then auto-compact will trigger if enabled.

ollamaAgent.enableThinking.markdownDescription: Enable chain-of-thought reasoning for models that support it (e.g. qwen3, deepseek-r1). The model will reason internally before responding — slower but more accurate for complex tasks like code verification, debugging, and doc cross-checking. Requires a compatible Ollama model.

ollamaAgent.search.url.markdownDescription:
URL of your [SearXNG](https://searxng.github.io/searxng/) instance, e.g. `http://192.168.1.100:8888`. Leave empty to disable web search (agent stays fully offline).

SearXNG is a free, self-hosted meta-search engine — no API key required. Run it alongside Ollama on the same host:
```
docker run -d --name searxng -p 8888:8080 \
  -e SEARXNG_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32) \
  searxng/searxng:latest
```
The agent appends `/search?q={query}&format=json` automatically. SearXNG must have the `json` output format enabled (on by default in the Docker image).

ollamaAgent.search.resultsLimit.markdownDescription: Maximum number of search results returned per `web_search` call (1–20, default 5). Higher values give the agent more context but use more tokens.

ollamaAgent.openClaw.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for your OpenCLAW instance, e.g. `http://localhost:18789`. Leave empty to disable `/openclaw` commands.

ollamaAgent.openClaw.token.markdownDescription: Bearer token for OpenCLAW authentication. Set via `openclaw config set gateway.token <your-token>` on your OpenCLAW server.

ollamaAgent.codeLens.enabled.markdownDescription: Show "✨ Explain" and "📝 Document" lenses above functions and classes. **Note:** May add visual clutter in large files.

ollamaAgent.inlineCompletions.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable inline code completions (similar to GitHub Copilot). Suggestions appear automatically as you type. **Note:** This feature uses your local Ollama model and may slow down typing on slower machines.

ollamaAgent.inlineCompletions.triggerMod.markdownDescription: How to trigger inline completions: `automatic` (as you type) or `manual` (only when you press the shortcut).

ollamaAgent.inlineCompletions.debounceMs.markdownDescription: Milliseconds to wait after typing stops before generating a completion. Higher values reduce API calls but increase latency.

ollamaAgent.maxTurnsPerSession.markdownDescription: Maximum number of agent tool-call turns per session. `0` (default) uses built-in limits per task type (sweep=50, merge=60, plan=50, normal=40, small-model=8). Set to a lower value (e.g. `24`) to cap resource usage for large models.

ollamaAgent.routing.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable automatic multi-model routing. When enabled, the agent uses a smaller/faster model for read-only exploration turns (shell_read, memory_search) and reserves the main model for write/edit turns. Configure the fast model with `routing.fastModel`.

ollamaAgent.routing.fastModel.markdownDescription: Model name to use for read-only exploration turns when `routing.enabled` is true (e.g. `qwen2.5-coder:1.5b`). Leave empty to use the main model for all turns.

ollamaAgent.routing.criticModel.markdownDescription: Model name to use for the automated critic review pass after edits when `routing.enabled` is true (e.g. `qwen2.5-coder:7b`). Leave empty to use the main model.

ollamaAgent.contextFile.autoUpdateDays.markdownDescription: Automatically refresh `AGENTS.md` in the background when it is older than this many days (checked on workspace open). Set to `0` to disable auto-refresh. The `/context` slash command always refreshes on demand regardless of this setting.
